title: Moosend vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Loops?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
